observations.value:
GET /search?q= always returns HTTP 200 with body containing '

No results found.

' regardless of the query term (tested with: 'test', 'apple', 'shirt', 'widget', 'product', 'blue+shirt', 'pants', 'a', '*'). Search never returns any results.

GET /logout returns HTTP 404 Not Found even though the app renders a 'Sign out' link on the home page after a successful login (POST /session with any credentials sets session=ok and shows the Sign out link). POST /logout also returns 404. The logout endpoint is completely missing.
